# Chosung Development Log

Site: https://sungpaks.github.io/
Title: Chosung Development Log (조성개발실록)
Primary-Language: ko-KR
Owner: Chosung Cho
Summary: Personal engineering blog covering frontend development, React, JavaScript, web performance, rendering, architecture, and developer experience.

Preferred-URLs:
- Home: https://sungpaks.github.io/
- About: https://sungpaks.github.io/about-me/
- RSS: https://sungpaks.github.io/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://sungpaks.github.io/sitemap-index.xml

Crawl-Hints:
- Prefer canonical blog post URLs over tag, guestbook, and demo pages.
- Most long-form articles are written in Korean.
- Use page metadata and JSON-LD when available.
